style_authority.note: Preserves the restrained, dense-but-calm enterprise-console authority, token-backed color boundary, and next-hour operator decision.

reference_selection.note: Uses only the needed dashboard hierarchy, anti-generic taste, design moves, tokens, resilient states, accessibility, and validation guidance.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Rejects equal-card hierarchy, decorative analytics, and generic tips for a lead decision object, support strip, exception queue, diagnostics, and actions.

evidence_level.note: Labels the review L0 static and prompt-only and caps the concept score because visual, responsive, accessibility, state, and runtime evidence are missing.

verified_boundary.note: Separates prompt-confirmed facts from unverified rendering, tokens, table behavior, accessibility, responsiveness, interaction states, and performance.

design_moves.note: Provides exactly eight concrete moves covering the lead decision object, support metrics, command context, diagnostic chart, exception queue, table, rail, and states.

scope_control.note: Stays read-only, dashboard-specific, and decisive at 95 logical lines, with exactly five blocking findings and eight concrete moves.
